title: Crafting Table Plus
description: Crafting table plus by ALhaZera25 , This mod allows you to craft various items from crafting tables that are not supported by Minecraft Vanilla.
body:
# CRAFTING TABLE PLUS

![Icon Crafting Table Plus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deae612c6386074c5bcde2b4c52342deb71ba3d8_0.webp)

This mod will help you create several items that cannot be crafted at the crafting table, both from useless items and useful items that can be made.

This mod will make it easier for you to fight many powerful entities from various mods.You can craft totems of undying, enchanted golden apple, elytra, and many other rare items that can be created.

You can see the recipes if you have obtained one of the materials needed to craft the item you want.

To see what can be made at the crafting table, you can check each changelog available for every version.
